name: HWR_WLNS_QSTN_VL
query: SELECT B.QUESTION_ID, B.FUS_PROFILE_ID, B.SOURCE_ID, B.CONVERSATION_ID, B.RESPONSES, B.EXPERTS, B.IS_VALID, B.IS_ANALYZED, T.QUESTION_TEXT, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HWR_WLNS_QSTN_B B, HWR_WLNS_QSTN_TL T WHERE B.QUESTION_ID = T.QUESTION_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
